article_title: Burnaby Council — 9.3. FMC - SU - Significant Civic Projects  - February 2026-03-10.pdf

briefs.title: Council to Consider Updates on Major Burnaby Civic Construction Projects and Staffing Plans
briefs.summary: Council is set to receive status updates on seven major civic building projects across Burnaby — including new recreation centres, a theatre, and a new RCMP building — plus a plan to hire and train up to 900 staff needed to run the new facilities.
briefs.action_required: Watch for council decisions on facility openings and staffing budgets — these could affect local hiring and service contracts.

key_dates.label: Mintara Restaurant Expansion — project handover to Parks, Recreation and Culture
